values.name: Foundation
values.use_when: the chapter establishes premises, architecture, or framing assumptions.

values.name: Development
values.use_when: the chapter extends and elaborates previously introduced arguments.

values.name: Evidence
values.use_when: the chapter mainly supplies empirical, textual, or historical support.

values.name: Objection Handling
values.use_when: the chapter addresses objections or rival positions.

values.name: Synthesis
values.use_when: the chapter consolidates strands into a larger interpretive whole.

values.name: Methodology
values.use_when: the chapter explains or performs the method itself.

values.name: Context
values.use_when: the chapter situates the argument historically or conceptually.

values.name: Conclusion
values.use_when: the chapter closes or ratifies the argument.

values.name: Transitional
values.use_when: the chapter mainly mediates shifts between argumentative zones.
